title: Qwen3.6 27B FP8 vLLM XPU PP2 n-gram guard diagnostics

environment.important_runtime_note: Do not source /opt/intel/oneapi/setvars.sh for vLLM runs; keep the venv lib directory first in LD_LIBRARY_PATH to avoid XCCL segfaults.

summary: Added an empty sampled-token guard for non-last pipeline-parallel ranks.
Added a scheduler recovery guard for negative scheduled-token deltas observed after speculative trimming.
Added a GPU n-gram buffer ownership guard because only the last PP rank allocates token_ids_gpu_tensor.
Added temporary trace logging behind VLLM_XPU_TRACE_NGRAM_PP=1.

runs.name: cpu_ngram_before_patch
runs.failure: IndexError: list index out of range at req_state.output_token_ids.append(new_token_ids[-1]) on a non-last PP rank. After the empty-token guard, this exposed num_scheduled_tokens=-3 / total_num_scheduled_tokens=-3.

runs.name: cpu_ngram_after_patch

trace_findings.interpretation: The guard makes the run complete, but CPU n-gram is not actually drafting in this PP2 path.

runs.localmaxxing_reason: Diagnostic run with trace logging and no effective speculative drafting; not useful as a leaderboard result.

runs.name: gpu_ngram_before_buffer_guard
runs.failure: AttributeError: 'XPUModelRunner' object has no attribute 'token_ids_gpu_tensor' on PP0. Only the last PP rank owns the GPU n-gram token buffers.

runs.name: gpu_ngram_after_buffer_guard

trace_findings.shared_memory_warning: No available shared memory broadcast block found in 60 seconds

runs.interpretation: The buffer ownership guard fixes the immediate attribute error, but ngram_gpu drafts are all invalid and the PP2 engine stalls.

current_best_fp8_speed_path.configuration: TP=4 PP=1, vLLM XPU compressed-tensors, CPU n-gram speculative decoding, 512 prompt / 512 output

conclusion: Keep PP2 as a memory-capacity path for long context or larger models. For single-session speed on Qwen3.6 27B FP8, TP4 remains the faster path until PP speculative scheduling is fixed.
